seo.defaultTitle: SkyRH — Modern HR & payroll for teams everywhere
seo.description: Run your whole people cycle — payroll, time off, hiring, performance and an employee self-service portal — on one platform, with compliance localized to your country.

hero.title: Modern HR and payroll for teams everywhere

features.heading: Everything your HR team needs

recruitment.title: Recruitment
